title: 40mm Baby Pink Organza Ribbon for Gift Wrapping & Crafts - Thick Chiffon Ribbon for Weddings, Christmas, DIY Projects
features: 💗Organza Ribbon: Each pack contains 1 spool of Sheer chiffon ribbon,Our handmade DIY satin ribbon includes 24 colors (Red,Gold,Green,Blue,Purple,Yellow,Grey,Black,Coffee,Rose,Bean Pink,Champagne,White,Wine red,Silver brown,Apricot.....) and 4 different sizes（15mm,20mm,25mm,40mm,）The clear chiffon ribbon is easy to cut with scissors so can be cut to any preferred length.

🧡Double Sided Ribbon: The sheer organza ribbon which both sides of it can be visible will elevate the appearance of craft gifts. Soft and silky material that can be used to make different shapes. Hair Ribbon for Women,Balloon Ribbon Present Ribbon Fabric Thick Ribbon for Crafting,Xmas,Florist,Bouquet,Wedding Car,Cake Decorations

💛Multlfunctional Ribbon: Our multicolor organza chiffon ribbons This is a DIY product, so you can adjust the ribbon and design color combinations according to your needs and preferences. Can be used as a party decorations, wedding decor, wedding car decor, card making,photo booth, table skirt, chair skirt/sash, bouquet wrapping, gift wrapping, making bows, sewing, DIY Crafts Creative Satin Ribbon and so on.
💚Exquisite organza fabric: chiffon fabric with shiny luster, not easy to tangles or wrinkles, packaging Christmas gifts and Thanksgiving gifts looks very delicate

💙Wide Usage:Sheer Chiffon Ribbon Suitable for your Scrapbook, bookmarks, gift cards, ribbon bows, decoration on lampshade, teddy bears, ribbons for hair, bags, baby pram, basket handle, champagne glasses, Shoes, handbags, ribbon embroidery, ribbon bracelet, make ribbons for top of gift boxes, make ribbon bows / rosebuds and many more things
